The tree isn't pruned so there are a lot of small ones but they look beautiful. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-November.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

The figs fall to the ground and rot every year. The tree is in the front yard. No fence, just walk right up. The owner doesn't mind at all, in fact she is happy to see someone enjoying them. Access: Permitted by owner. Falling Fruit season: May-September.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
